records.sql: DELETE FROM doctors WHERE doctors.first_name = '123'
records.nl_prompt: Wipe out physician where forename is equal to '123'

records.sql: DELETE FROM appointments WHERE appointments.scheduled_at <= DATETIME('now', '-25 days')
records.nl_prompt: Strip out appointment where scheduled at less than or equal to 25 days ago

records.sql: DELETE FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.dosage <> 'user'
records.nl_prompt: Drop medication order where dose is not 'user'

records.sql: DELETE FROM doctors WHERE doctors.email <> 'user36@example.com'
records.nl_prompt: Drop medical doctor where email address is not equal to 'user36@example.com'

records.sql: DELETE FROM appointments WHERE appointments.doctor_id <= 930
records.nl_prompt: Wipe out visit where doctor id maximum of 930

records.sql: DELETE FROM appointments WHERE appointments.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-7 days')
records.nl_prompt: Strip out appointment where creation date below 7 days ago
